name: space_operations_licensing_backlog_forces_lumen_ind_col
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Space Operations, the situation tagged internally around space operations licensing backlog forces lumen ind col has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Zara Reed
agents.identity: I am Zara Reed, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Space Operations. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Dubois
agents.identity: I am Inez Dubois, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Space Operations. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so collective does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so individual does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Zara Reed must choose under individual versus collective. What does Zara Reed do?
